overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing the character Franklin walking through a historic stone cemetery with mature trees and monuments, transitioning through a stone archway to exit onto an urban residential street with brick buildings, parked cars, and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cemetery with stone monuments and tree canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding cemetery path between stone walls and tombstones

notable_agents.action: man sitting on green bench reading a newspaper

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall running along the left side of the path
large vertical stone pillar monument with ornate carving
gray concrete walking path with scattered leaves
mature trees with hanging branches creating dappled shade
wooden slatted bench with green paint
stone arch entrance visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a serene, tree-shaded cemetery enclosed by stone walls. The path winds past tombstones and vintage lampposts. A man sits reading on a green bench to the left as the character approaches a distant stone archway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: cemetery exit transitioning to urban street

events.description: passes through the stone archway exiting the cemetery enclosure
climbs over the stone cemetery wall to descend to street level

agents.ego_description: passing through the stone archway and climbing over the perimeter wall to exit the cemetery grounds

entered.detail: small stone building with gabled roof and green door
city street with visible lane markings
row of parked vehicles along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone archway into a more open area with a small mausoleum, then climbs over the cemetery wall to reach the city street. The scene transitions from enclosed green space to urban environment with brick buildings and parked cars becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: crosses the asphalt road at the marked crosswalk
passes close by a woman in a yellow dress on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the city street and continuing along the sidewalk next to the cemetery wall

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: traffic signal pole at the intersection
paved pedestrian walkway with hexagonal tiles
tall suspension bridge tower visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto the urban street, crosses at the crosswalk, and walks along the sidewalk. The cemetery wall now runs along the right side. The character passes a woman in a yellow dress and continues toward a distant bridge tower, with brick apartment buildings lining the left side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the quiet seclusion of a historic cemetery into the bustling activity of an urban residential street. It begins by following the character through a serene, tree-shaded graveyard, winding past vintage lampposts and tombstones while passing a man reading on a green bench. As the character approaches and passes through a stone archway, the enclosed greenery gives way to a small mausoleum before the camera follows him climbing over a perimeter wall. The scene then opens onto a city street where the environment shifts abruptly to brick apartment buildings and parked cars. Finally, the character crosses a street at a crosswalk and walks along the sidewalk past a woman in a yellow dress, moving toward a distant bridge tower with the cemetery wall now trailing to the right.
